title: Gooey Garlic Irish Stir-fry
description: A garlicky, gooey post-workout dish featuring cherry tomatoes, grilled chicken or steak, and a dash-friendly sauce.

ingredients.name: grilled chicken or steak
ingredients.notes: Marinated with garlic and olive oil

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes, tossing occasionally.
Fold in marinated grilled chicken or steak slices, ensuring they are coated with the garlic mixture.
Pour in red wine vinegar and brown sugar; stir well to combine. Cook for another 3-5 minutes until thickened slightly.
Season with salt and pepper if needed.
Serve hot as a post-workout snack.
